description_long: This is a weathered, upright gravestone made of gray stone, set on a rectangular stone base surrounded by a patch of earth and dried leaves. The gravestone is rectangular with a slightly rounded top and shows significant signs of aging, including discoloration and surface erosion. The front face features faint, partially legible inscriptions, likely denoting the name and dates of the deceased, though the text is difficult to read due to wear. The sides of the gravestone are plain and vertical, with the stone's texture and weathering visible. The back is unadorned and shows more pronounced staining and surface roughness. The base is broad and flat, providing stability and a small platform around the gravestone.
description: A weathered, upright gray stone gravestone with faint inscriptions, set on a rectangular stone base surrounded by earth and dried leaves.
description_view_0: The front view shows the gravestone's face with faint, partially legible inscriptions and the rectangular stone base with dried leaves around it.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the gravestone's vertical, plain surface and the thickness of the stone, with the base visible below.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the unadorned back of the gravestone, showing pronounced weathering and discoloration, with the base and surrounding earth visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the gravestone's plain, vertical surface and the rectangular base, similar to the left side.
